fig: noun. The fruit of the fig tree, pear -shaped and containing many small seeds.
fin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Finnish.
fist: noun. A hand with the fingers clenched or curled inward.
fit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Meänkieli.
fug: noun. A heavy, musty, stuffy or unpleasant atmosphere, usually in a poorly-ventilated area.
fun: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Fulniô.
fungi: noun. Spongy, abnormal growth, as granulation tissue formed in a wound.
funs: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of fun
fusing: verb. present participle and gerund of fuse
gist: noun. The main idea or substance, or the most essential part, of a longer or more complicated matter; the crux, the heart, the pith.
git: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Gitxsan.
gnu: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Gnau.
gun: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Mbya Guarani.
gust: noun. A strong, abrupt rush of wind.
gut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Maléku Jaíka.
iff: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ifo.
ins: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Indian Sign Language.
its: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Itsekiri.
nit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeastern Kolami.
nus: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nuer.
nut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nùng.
sign: noun. A visible fact that shows that something exists or may happen.
sit: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-5 language code for Sino-Tibetan languages.
sniff: verb. To make a short, audible inhalation, through the nose, as when smelling something.
snit: noun. A temper; a bad mood.
snuff: noun. Finely ground or pulverized tobacco (or other plant derivative) intended for use by being sniffed or snorted into the nose.
stiff: adjective. Rigid; hard to bend; inflexible.
sting: noun. A bump left on the skin after having been stung.
stuff: noun. Miscellaneous items or objects; (with possessive) personal effects.
stuffing: verb. present participle and gerund of stuff
stun: verb. To incapacitate; especially by inducing disorientation or unconsciousness.
stung: verb. simple past and past participle of sting
tiff: noun. A (generally small) argument or disagreement; a petty quarrel, a spat.
tis: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Masadiit Itneg.
unfit: adjective. Not fit; not having the correct requirements.
unfits: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of unfit
unit: noun. Oneness, singularity, seen as a component of a whole number; a magnitude of one.
using: verb. present participle and gerund of use
